basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bathinda Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda) Project Technical Support III Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. AB/Micro/2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bathinda Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation up to 5 years for Government Servants and for SC/ST/OBC candidates in accordance with the instructions issued by the Department of Personnel and Training from time to time. Age relaxation may be given to candidates having working experience in ICMR or any other govt. funded projects.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree with Biotechnology/Biomedical/Life Sciences with 3 years' post-qualification experience (BSc/BTech/BSc MLT), Postgraduate degree with Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biomedical Sciences/Life Sciences (MSc/MTech/MSc MLT)
qualification.details: Graduate degree with Biotechnology/Biomedical/Life Sciences with 3 years' post-qualification experience (BSc/BTech in above mentioned disciplines/BSc MLT) OR Postgraduate degree with Biotechnology/Microbiology/ Biomedical Sciences/ Life Sciences (MSc/MTech in above mentioned disciplines/MSc MLT).

selection_process: Document Verification Interview Written exam or both

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bathinda Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bathinda Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bathinda?
faq.answer: The last date for candidates to apply and attend the walk-in interview for the Project Technical Support III post at AIIMS Bathinda is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to report by 09:00 AM on the interview date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support III post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Technical Support III position, candidates must possess a Graduate degree in Biotechnology/Biomedical/Life Sciences with 3 years of post-qualification experience, or a Postgraduate degree in Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biomedical Sciences/Life Sciences.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support III post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for Government Servants and SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technical Support III post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,800 per month, which includes a fixed component and HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by AIIMS Bathinda.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Bathinda Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve Document Verification, followed by an Interview. A written exam may also be conducted, or it could be a combination of both.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda, Punjab, Pin Code: 151001. Candidates must report at the specified venue on the interview date.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Project Technical Support III position at AIIMS Bathinda is a contractual job. The appointment will be on a contract basis for the duration of the project.

faq.question: Q10. How can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the AIIMS Bathinda website. A direct link to the PDF notification is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
